Operation 'createDocument' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on return value and state transitions. Added explicit information about the returned document object, default status behavior, and how to monitor generation progress for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Creates a new document and optionally queues it for generation. Set status to 'pending' to trigger generation immediately.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new document with template and data payload. Returns the created document object with a unique identifier. Set status to 'pending' in the request to trigger asynchronous PDF generation immediately; otherwise the document is created in 'draft' status. Generation occurs server-side and can be monitored via polling or webhook.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on return value and state transitions. Added explicit information about the returned document object, default status behavior, and how to monitor generation progress for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createDocumentSync' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing information about what is returned and when to use this operation versus the async variant. Added return value details, timeout behavior clarity, and use case guidance for AI agents to make appropriate operation selection.

data.current_description: Creates a document and waits for PDF generation to complete server-side. Has a 6-minute timeout.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a document and synchronously waits for PDF generation to complete server-side before returning. Returns the fully generated document with PDF file reference. Request times out after 6 minutes if generation does not complete. Use this operation when immediate PDF availability is required; otherwise use asynchronous createDocument for better performance.
data.reasoning: Missing information about what is returned and when to use this operation versus the async variant. Added return value details, timeout behavior clarity, and use case guidance for AI agents to make appropriate operation selection.

message: Operation 'getDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Summary 'Get full document' is vague about what 'full' means. Description lacks context about what specific fields are included and when to use this versus the card endpoint. Added clarity on contents and guidance for operation selection.

data.current_description: Retrieves complete document including payload and generation logs.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve complete document with generation details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete document object including template payload, data, generation status, logs, and generated PDF file reference. Use this operation when you need full diagnostic information; for lightweight document metadata, use getDocumentCard instead.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Get full document' is vague about what 'full' means. Description lacks context about what specific fields are included and when to use this versus the card endpoint. Added clarity on contents and guidance for operation selection.

message: Operation 'updateDocument' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about return value, partial update behavior, and constraints. Added explicit return value, clarification on partial updates, and operational constraints to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and limitations.

data.current_description: Updates document payload, metadata, or triggers generation by setting status to 'pending'.
data.description_suggestion: Updates document payload, metadata, or generation status. Set status to 'pending' to trigger PDF generation. Returns the updated document object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Cannot update documents currently being generated.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about return value, partial update behavior, and constraints. Added explicit return value, clarification on partial updates, and operational constraints to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and limitations.

message: Operation 'deleteDocument' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about return value and operational constraints. Added explicit return behavior and constraint about in-progress documents to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and limitations.

data.current_description: Permanently deletes a document and its generated file.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a document and its associated generated PDF file. This action is irreversible. Returns a success confirmation. Cannot delete documents currently being generated.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about return value and operational constraints. Added explicit return behavior and constraint about in-progress documents to help AI agents understand the operation's effects and limitations.

Added specific filter options, pagination parameter details, and sort order to help AI agents construct appropriate queries and understand response structure.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of document cards with optional filtering.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of lightweight document card representations. Supports filtering by status, template, and date range. Pagination is controlled via limit and offset parameters. Returns document cards sorted by creation date in descending order.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about available filters and pagination mechanism. Added specific filter options, pagination parameter details, and sort order to help AI agents construct appropriate queries and understand response structure.
